senses.definition: to blow and dry hair and style it in a particular fashion using a dryer
to use a tool to arrange or tidy up your hair

examples.x: She brushes her hair every morning to make it smooth and neat.
He brushes his hair before leaving the house to remove tangles and create a polished look.
He brushes his daughter's hair gently to remove knots and tangles.
They brush their pet's fur regularly to keep it clean and free of mats.
The stylist brushes the client's hair to achieve the desired style.

senses.definition: to put a substance on the hair or skin in order to make it healthy and smooth

examples.x: After shampooing, she always takes the time to condition her hair, leaving it silky and easy to manage.
The spa offers a special treatment to condition the skin, leaving it refreshed and rejuvenated.
Using a deep-conditioning mask once a week helps to nourish and condition the hair, preventing dryness and split ends.
The dermatologist recommended a daily routine to cleanse and condition the skin, maintaining its natural moisture balance.
The conditioner she chose is infused with natural oils to deeply condition and hydrate her hair.

senses.definition: to make tight curls in someone's hair using a hair iron

examples.x: The stylist crimped her hair to add texture and volume for a retro-inspired look.
She crimped her hair before the party to achieve a unique and playful hairstyle.
She decided to crimp her hair for a '80s-themed costume party, embracing the retro style.
The actress's hair was beautifully crimped for the red carpet event, adding a touch of glamour to her look.
After straightening her hair, she crimped specific sections to give it a more textured and dynamic style.

senses.definition: to cut someone's hair short

examples.x: She decided to crop her hair for a fresh new look before starting college.
He asked the stylist to crop his hair into a low-maintenance style for the summer.
The barber expertly cropped his hair, giving him a clean and stylish appearance.
She's thinking of cropping her hair into a pixie cut for a bold change.
The actress cropped her long locks for a role in an upcoming movie.

senses.definition: to form or shape hair into a series of loops or spirals using a curling iron, rollers, or other styling tools

examples.x: She curled her long hair before the party, using a curling iron to add volume and bounce.
Every morning, she spends time curling her hair with hot rollers to achieve the perfect wavy look.
The hairstylist expertly curled the bride's hair, creating elegant cascading curls for her wedding day.
After washing her hair, she likes to air dry it and then curl it with a wand for natural-looking curls.
Her short hair is easy to style; she just needs to quickly curl it with her fingers to add texture and volume.

senses.definition: to remove lice or similar insects from someone's hair or an animals coating
to change the color of something using a liquid substance

examples.x: She decided to dye her white shirt pink.
Last weekend, they dyed Easter eggs with various colors.
Tomorrow, he will dye his hair with a bold color.
By the end of the project, the entire garment will have been beautifully dyed.
Some people prefer to dye their gray hair instead of leaving it natural.

senses.definition: (of hair, makeup, or outfit) to rearrange in order to look nice and tidy

examples.x: She quickly fixed her hair in a neat bun before heading to the office.
After the windy walk, she had to fix her disheveled hair in front of a mirror.
He asked his friend to fix his tie and straighten his collar for a more polished appearance.
The hairstylist fixed her hair in an elegant updo for the special occasion.
She used a compact mirror to fix her eyeliner and ensure it was perfectly applied.

senses.definition: the act of cutting hair or having our hair cut
the skill or action of cutting and arranging hair in a beautiful way
the action or process of dressing someone's hair in a particular fashion
to spend time in front of a mirror to arrange hair and fix makeup or appearance in an attractive and elaborate way
to arrange wet hair in a way that stays the same after being dried

examples.x: She used hairspray to set her curls in place for the evening.
After washing her hair, she used clips to set it in sections.
She used hair rollers to set her curls.
After washing her hair, she set it in a bun to create waves.
He used bobby pins to set his bangs while they dried.

senses.definition: to cut beard, hair, or fur in a neat and orderly manner

examples.x: The barber skillfully trimmed the customer's hair to achieve a polished look.
He decided to trim his beard for a more groomed and tidy appearance.
In preparation for the event, she visited the salon to trim her split ends.
The dog groomer used scissors to carefully trim the fur around the paws, giving the pet a clean and well-groomed look.

senses.definition: the activity of keeping tidy and neat by brushing hair, keeping clothes clean, etc.
the way in which someone's hair is arranged
to comb hair in the opposite direction that it naturally lies in order to make it look thicker
to make hair appear thick and full-bodied
to become or to cause something, such as tangled hair, become separated
the style in which a person's hair is arranged
the style or the act of cutting someone's hair
to twist two or three strands of hair in a way that forms a single intertwined piece

examples.x: She braided her hair into a stylish side braid.
The mother skillfully braided her daughter's hair for school.
The hairstylist demonstrated how to braid a fishtail pattern.
The horse's mane was neatly braided for the competition.

senses.definition: to use a tool with narrow, evenly spaced teeth to untangle and arrange hair

examples.x: She combs her hair every morning before leaving for work.
He combs his beard to keep it neat and tidy.
He combs his daughter's hair into a ponytail before school.
They comb through their pet's fur to remove any tangles or knots.

senses.definition: to apply hair gel to someone's hair
to make parts of the hair a shade lighter than the rest using chemical substances

examples.x: She decided to highlight her dark brown hair with caramel-colored streaks for a subtle sun-kissed look.
The stylist used foils to highlight sections of her hair with blonde tones.
He requested the stylist to highlight his black hair with bold red streaks for a vibrant and edgy appearance.
The salon offers various techniques to highlight hair, including balayage.
She experimented with different shades to highlight her hair, eventually settling on a mix of honey and caramel tones.

senses.definition: to cut hair at different lengths in a way that forms overlapping layers

examples.x: She layered her hair to add volume and texture.
The stylist layered his hair to create a more dynamic look.
He asked for his hair to be layered to reduce the bulk and enhance the shape.
She layered the hair in the back to create a smooth, flowing effect.
The barber layered his hair, giving it a modern appearance.

senses.definition: to divide someone's hair in two parts with a comb creating a line on the scalp

examples.x: The hairstylist carefully parted her client's hair down the middle before beginning the haircut.
After washing her hair, she used a comb to part it in the center for a symmetrical style.
The actor's hair was neatly parted on the left side for his role in the period drama.
She decided to part her hair in a zigzag pattern, adding a touch of flair to her hairstyle.
The barber expertly parted the customer's hair with precision, ensuring a clean and even line.

senses.definition: to make a straight hair become curly for a period of time, using chemicals
to twist two or three strands of hair in a way that forms a single intertwined piece
to comb or style one's hair by smoothing it away from the face using a grooming product like gel or pomade, creating a sleek and neat appearance
to dry hair by gently squeezing or scrunching it to enhance natural curls, waves, or texture
to wash something, like hair or carpets, using a special cleaning solution

examples.x: He shampoos his dog's fur to keep it clean and smelling good.
He shampoos the carpets in the living room to remove stains and odors.

senses.definition: to use styling products or tools to flatten and tame the hair, making it appear smooth, sleek, and well-groomed

examples.x: She used gel to sleek down her hair, giving it a polished look for the event.
After brushing, he sleeked down his dog’s fur to remove any tangles.
The stylist sleeked down the model's hair before the photoshoot for a sophisticated appearance.
He quickly sleeked down his unruly hair with a bit of water before heading out.
He always carries a comb to sleek down his hair during long workdays.

senses.definition: to make someone's hair flat and shiny using water or oil

examples.x: He slicked his hair back with gel before heading out for the evening.
She slicked her son’s hair down with water for the school photo.
The stylist slicked her client’s hair to give it a sleek, polished look.
He quickly slicked his hair after stepping out of the shower.
She used oil to slick her hair into a smooth ponytail.

senses.definition: to mark with spots or blotches of different color or shades of color as if stained
to add height and texture to hair by gently combing it backward in small sections

examples.x: She teased her hair to give it more volume for the party.
The stylist carefully teased each layer to achieve a fuller look.
He teased the roots to create a lifted effect at the crown.
She teased the ends lightly to make her ponytail appear thicker.
Teasing her hair gave it the perfect amount of texture and body.

senses.definition: to color someone's hair using a chemical

examples.x: She likes to tint her hair with subtle highlights.
The stylist is currently tinting her client's hair with a rich brown shade.
Last month, she tinted her hair with a bold and vibrant color.
While at the salon, she was happily tinting her hair with a fashionable hue.
Over time, the sun has tinted her hair to a lighter tone.

senses.definition: to make someone's hair appear untidy or unruly
to loosen or reduce curl or wave pattern in the hair for a straighter or smoother look, often using heat styling tools or techniques

examples.x: She relaxed her hair with a straightener to achieve a sleek look.
The stylist used a special cream to relax her curls, making them more manageable.
He relaxed his hair before the event, hoping for a polished, professional style.
The treatment helped relax the waves in her hair, leaving it soft and straight.
She prefers to relax her hair with a blow-dryer, reducing the volume of curls.

senses.definition: to style someone's hair with a light foamy product
to brush or comb hair back from the face

examples.x: She swept her bangs back from her forehead with a quick motion.
He swept his hair to the side to keep it out of his eyes.
He swept his long hair out of his face before continuing his work.
She smiled and swept a lock of hair behind her ear.
With a swift motion, she swept her hair back, ready to start her day.

senses.definition: to squeeze the hair with hands to make it look wavy

examples.x: After applying a styling mousse, she would scrunch her hair gently to enhance its natural waves.
To achieve a beachy look, the hairstylist advised her to scrunch her damp hair with a sea salt spray.
He would scrunch his short hair with a gel to create a messy, tousled look that was effortlessly stylish.
She taught her daughter how to scrunch her long locks with a lightweight styling cream.
With a diffuser attachment on her blow dryer, she would scrunch her hair as she dried it.

senses.definition: the practice and products used to maintain the health, cleanliness, and appearance of one's hair
to apply a natural plant-based dye, typically derived from the henna plant
to apply a scented oil to hair to make it shiny
to make someone look neat and clean by fixing their hair, clothes, or overall appearance

examples.x: He grooms his hair meticulously every morning before leaving for work.
She groomed the children before they left for the party.
He always makes sure to groom himself before any formal occasion.
They groomed the bride’s appearance, adjusting her veil and dress.
She quickly groomed her hair and fixed her makeup before the interview.
